hero:
# Audio Similarity Recommender

**Audio-feature similarity & genre classification · Python · Scikit-learn · BeautifulSoup**

## Hero Overview

A pipeline transforming semi-structured artist data into clean datasets for 20K+ artists, extracting MFCC audio features and projecting them with PCA, t-SNE and UMAP.

A GTZAN genre classifier (Support Vector Classifier) reached ~74% accuracy with 0.97 AUC, feeding an artist-similarity recommender concept.

points.evidence: Built a weekly ingestion pipeline transforming semi-structured NoSQL artist data into clean Pandas datasets for 20K+ artists.
Automated WAV retrieval/preprocessing, extracting 20 MFCCs per track and standardizing inputs for downstream work.
Applied PCA, t-SNE and UMAP across MFCC space, preserving audio-pattern structure for clustering and visualization.
Trained an SVC genre classifier on GTZAN MFCC features reaching ~74% accuracy and 0.97 AUC, leading benchmarks.

network_graph.title: Technology Capability Network
network_graph.description: Maps the project's core techniques to the tools used to implement them.

storyline:
# Storyline

## Context

Music discovery benefits from similarity grounded in actual audio characteristics, not just metadata tags.

## Workflow

Weekly artist-data ingestion → audio feature extraction → manifold projection → genre classification → recommender concept.

## Technical Implementation

- **Ingestion:** BeautifulSoup/Regex pipeline transforming NoSQL artist data into Pandas frames for 20K+ artists.
- **Features:** WAV preprocessing extracting 20 MFCCs per track with standardized inputs.
- **Projection:** PCA, t-SNE and UMAP across MFCC space for structure-preserving clustering.
- **Classification:** SVC on GTZAN MFCC features, ~74% accuracy and 0.97 AUC.

## Outcomes

Bridged audio-feature extraction and similarity output into a recommender concept framing similarity as a music-curation lens.
